mapper.select: SELECT c.*, f.* FROM censor c JOIN facility f ON c.facility_num = f.facility_num
SELECT fm.*, f.facility_name, e.ename FROM facility_management fm JOIN facility f ON fm.facility_num = f.facility_num JOIN emp e ON fm.emp_num = e.emp_num ORDER BY fm.managed_at DESC

SELECT fm.*, f.facility_name, e.ename FROM facility_management fm JOIN facility f ON fm.facility_num = f.facility_num JOIN emp e ON fm.emp_num = e.emp_num
AND fm.managed_at >= TO_DATE(#{sDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND fm.managed_at < TO_DATE(#{eDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND f.facility_name = #{type}
ORDER BY fm.managed_at DESC
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO censor c USING facility f ON (c.censor_num = f.facility_num) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET c.c_temperature = ROUND( LEAST( GREATEST(c.c_temperature + (c.c_temperature * 0.01 * DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(-1, 1)), f.m_temperature * 0.84), f.m_temperature * 1.17 ), 1 ),
c_humidity = ROUND( LEAST( GREATEST(c_humidity + (c_humidity * 0.01 * DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(-1, 1)), f.m_humidity * 0.84), f.m_humidity * 1.17 ), 1 ),
c_soil_ec = ROUND( LEAST( GREATEST(c_soil_ec + (c_soil_ec * 0.01 * DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(-1, 1)), f.m_soil_ec * 0.84), f.m_soil_ec * 1.17 ), 1 ),
c_soil_ph = ROUND( LEAST( GREATEST(c_soil_ph + (c_soil_ph * 0.01 * DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(-1, 1)), f.m_soil_ph * 0.84), f.m_soil_ph * 1.17 ), 1 ),
c_illuminance = ROUND( LEAST( GREATEST(c_illuminance + (c_illuminance * 0.01 * DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(-1, 1)), f.m_illuminance * 0.84), f.m_illuminance * 1.17 ), 1 ) WHERE c.c_temperature IS NOT NULL
mapper.select: SELECT emp_num, ename FROM emp WHERE status = 'Y' AND dept_num IN (3,5)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO facility_management ( facility_management_num, temperature, humidity, soil_ec, soil_ph, illuminance, managed_at, facility_chk, facility_num, emp_num ) SELECT fm_seq.NEXTVAL, c.c_temperature, c.c_humidity, c.c_soil_ec, c.c_soil_ph, c.c_illuminance, CAST(SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' AS DATE), CASE WHEN ABS(c.c_temperature - f.m_temperature) >= ABS(f.m_temperature * 0.1) THEN '점검필요' ELSE '정상' END, c.censor_num, #{emp_num} FROM censor c JOIN facility f ON c.censor_num = f.facility_num
